metadata.title: AndrijaDev - Web Developer
metadata.description: Turning your ideas into web applications. Professional web development, design, and maintenance services.

footer.tagline: Turning your ideas into web applications.

home.title: AndrijaDev
home.subtitle: Turning your ideas into web applications.

metadata.title: About - AndrijaDev
metadata.description: Professional web development, design, and maintenance. Meet the developer behind the AndrijaDev brand.

hero.name: Andrija
hero.subtitle1: I help businesses bring their digital ideas to life.
hero.subtitle2: AndrijaDev is my freelance brand for modern web applications.

bio.paragraph1: I am a graduate mathematician from the Faculty of Mathematics, University of Belgrade. I build websites and applications using Next.js, React, and TypeScript.
bio.paragraph2: I value clear communication and meeting deadlines. After launch, I remain available for maintenance and support.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.description: We discuss your idea and goals. Clear communication from day one ensures we understand each other and define the right direction for the project.

plan.title: Plan
plan.description: I define the architecture and project plan with a focus on code quality, maintainability, and performance that will serve your product long-term.

development.title: Development
development.description: I build the solution using Next.js, React, and TypeScript, with regular progress updates and room to adapt as we go.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: Production deployment with performance and SEO optimization. I remain available for maintenance, updates, and support after launch.

metadata.title: Contact - AndrijaDev
metadata.description: Get in touch about websites, web apps, design, or maintenance. Send a message and I'll respond as soon as possible.

hero.title: Get in touch
hero.subtitle: Tell me about your idea - websites, web apps, design, or maintenance.

info.intro: Available for new projects and collaborations. Reach out and let's discuss how I can help bring your idea to life.
